title: rubus vistulanus
intro: Rubus vistulanus, also known as the Vistula raspberry or white raspberry, is a species of raspberry that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is native to Europe and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus vistulanus include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Rubus vistulanus typically include dried leaves, fruits, and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
